# Copilot Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Scaffold the Project (React + Vite)
- [x] Customize the Project (Tailwind CSS, Folders, Components)
- [x] Install Required Extensions (None)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
- [x] Implement Multi-page Routing (React Router)
- [x] Create Destination Details Page
- [x] create Trip Result Page (AI Integration)
